name: @lnittman/pi-prompts
description_en: Shared system-prompt scaffolding for pi-coding-agent forks — date/time injection, context files, skills block, standard guidelines, and the buildSystemPrompt composer.
description_zh: 用于 pi-coding-agent 分支的共享系统提示脚手架 — 日期/时间注入、上下文文件、技能块、标准指南和 buildSystemPrompt 编排器。
